draft_response: Dear Amit, I apologize for the frustration and inconvenience you've experienced with being charged twice for your premium subscription after attempting to cancel it, and not receiving a proper response from our support team despite your two previous attempts. I understand that this situation is extremely frustrating for you, and I'm truly sorry that we've fallen short of our service standards. To better assist you, could you please provide us with your invoice ID or the registered email address associated with your account? This information will help our billing support team to expedite the review of your case. We will verify the details of your cancellation request and the duplicate charge with our billing team. Your issue has been escalated to our billing support team for immediate attention, and we will provide you with a personal update on the resolution. Please be assured that we're taking your concerns seriously and are committed to resolving this matter as soon as possible.
response_strategy: The response aims to acknowledge Amit's concerns, show empathy, and request necessary information to expedite the resolution of the billing issue while escalating the matter to the billing support team.
assumptions: The customer has indeed cancelled their subscription and is being incorrectly charged
The customer's previous interactions with support were not resolved to their satisfaction
information_needed_before_sending: Verification of the customer's account details
Confirmation of the billing issue from the billing support team
